```](#)# Creating your file...This may take a few minutes. Thanks for your patience.CancelYour file is readyOKThe Active IQ Unified Manager Initial Setup dialog box appears when you first access the web UI, which enables you to configure some initial settings and to add clusters.Steps1. Accept the default AutoSupport enabled setting.
2. Enter the NTP server details, the maintenance user email address, the SMTP server host name, and additional SMTP options, and then click **Save**.After you finishWhen the initial setup is complete, the Cluster Data Sources page is displayed where you can add the cluster details.
